trans-unit.id: How to install and enable the addon in Godot
trans-unit.source: How to install and enable the addon in Godot
trans-unit.target: Cómo instalar y activar el addon en Godot

trans-unit.id: No connection to the Godot editor. Install and enable the "MX Console" addon, open a project, and keep the editor running.
trans-unit.source: No connection to the Godot editor. Install and enable the "MX Console" addon, open a project, and keep the editor running.
trans-unit.target: No hay conexión con el editor de Godot. Instala y activa el addon «MX Console», abre un proyecto y deja el editor en marcha.

trans-unit.id: Lost connection to the editor bridge. Make sure Godot is still running and the "MX Console" addon is enabled under Project → Project Settings → Plugins.
trans-unit.source: Lost connection to the editor bridge. Make sure Godot is still running and the "MX Console" addon is enabled under Project → Project Settings → Plugins.
trans-unit.target: Se perdió la conexión con el bridge del editor. Comprueba que Godot siga abierto y el addon «MX Console» activo en Proyecto → Configuración del proyecto → Plugins.
